concerns.detail: Use of ethnic slur '棒子姐' (derogatory term for Korean women) to attack a student's character
concerns.excerpt: 韩国的那个棒子姐确实名声很差

concerns.detail: Vulgar personal insult comparing professor to a maggot ('路边一条蛆')
concerns.excerpt: 路边一条蛆，组里学生方差太大

concerns.detail: Deletion of substantive entries about MIT Paul Liang and UCSB Yuheng Bu containing specific criticisms of advising practices (horizontal projects, TA workload, PUA behavior)
concerns.excerpt: MIT paul liang... UCSB Yuheng Bu... 又要做横向又要做TA，说话老难听，PUA人

concerns.detail: Deletion of restored entry for UC Merced Yiwei Wang containing detailed criticisms (publication requirements, lab management, recommendation letter practices)
concerns.excerpt: UC Merced, Yiwei Wang (为什么删掉了)... 7篇ccf-a三年毕业... 据说会给黑推
